# tile_manager

Manages multiple `theme_widget` instances in a tiled layout.

## Architecture

```
page.js (root)
    ‚Üì
tile_manager ‚Üê handles layout tree, split actions
    ‚Üì
theme_widget #1    theme_widget #2    ...
(full VM)          (full VM)
```

## Supported Directions

- `right` ‚Äî new tile appears to the right
- `left` ‚Äî new tile appears to the left  
- `up` ‚Äî new tile appears above
- `down` ‚Äî new tile appears below
